name: Dungeons and Dragons RPG
description:
So, how’s everyone been? This bot is mostly a bit of a joke bot as I dunno how I’m gonna make a DnD bot.

Yes I’m still retired UNLESS this bot does well.

Gonna sound crazy but I use 3 initial messages and a create your own too. It took A WHILE to get it to release. Music mania tag ain't working on this bot so here's the song I wanted for this (Tavern scenario): Tavern song

Welcome to the world of Dungeons and Dragons! In this world you can choose 1 beginner class from a list which can change into a subclass!

Goblins passing left and right, paladins fighting in front, archers training, brawlers boxing, and a lot else can be seen!
creator: that_one_guy_with_tism
